mapper.select: SELECT g.*, s.name as student_name, s.student_no, co.course_name FROM edu_grade g LEFT JOIN edu_student s ON g.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN edu_course co ON g.course_id = co.id WHERE g.id = #{id}

SELECT g.id, g.midterm_score, g.final_score, g.practice_score, g.total_score, g.makeup_score, g.grade_status, g.input_by, g.input_time,g.create_time,g.update_time, cs.teaching_assignment_id, ta.semester, ta.course_id, s.name as student_name, s.student_no, s.id as student_id FROM edu_teaching_assignment ta left join edu_course_selection cs on cs.teaching_assignment_id = ta.id left join edu_student s on s.id = cs.student_id LEFT JOIN edu_grade g ON g.student_id = s.id AND g.teaching_assignment_id = #{teachingAssignmentId} WHERE ta.id = #{teachingAssignmentId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO edu_grade (student_id, course_id, teaching_assignment_id, semester, grade_status) VALUES
(#{g.studentId}, #{g.courseId}, #{g.teachingAssignmentId}, #{g.semester}, 0)

update.foreach: UPDATE edu_grade SET midterm_score = #{g.midtermScore}, final_score = #{g.finalScore}, practice_score = #{g.practiceScore}, total_score = #{g.totalScore}, grade_status = #{g.gradeStatus}, input_by = #{g.inputBy}, input_time = #{g.inputTime} WHERE id = #{g.id}
